title: Convert website language from Hindi to English

requirements.text: Convert all Hindi text content to English across all pages including Home, About, Academics, Admissions, Gallery, Contact, and Registration pages

quotes: Meri website ko English language me kr do

acceptanceCriteria: All page headings are in English
All body text and descriptions are in English
All button labels and CTAs are in English
All form labels and placeholders are in English
All navigation menu items are in English
All toast notifications and success messages are in English

requirements.text: Update the Header navigation menu items from Hindi to English: replace 'मुख्य पृष्ठ' with 'Home', 'हमारे बारे में' with 'About', 'शैक्षिक' with 'Academics', 'प्रवेश' with 'Admissions', 'गैलरी' with 'Gallery', 'संपर्क' with 'Contact', and 'छात्र पंजीकरण' with 'Student Registration'
acceptanceCriteria: All navigation links display English text
Mobile menu also shows English navigation items

requirements.text: Convert the Home page hero section, feature cards, and CTA buttons to English including school tagline, quality education description, and all button text
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays English content
Feature cards have English titles and descriptions
CTA buttons show English labels

requirements.text: Translate the About page mission, vision, educational approach, and core values sections from Hindi to English
acceptanceCriteria: Mission and vision statements are in English
Educational approach description is in English
All core values are listed in English

requirements.text: Convert the Academics page curriculum tabs (primary, middle, secondary) and subject listings from Hindi to English
acceptanceCriteria: Tab labels are in English
All subject names are in English
Special activities descriptions are in English

requirements.text: Translate the Admissions page enrollment process steps and contact information from Hindi to English
acceptanceCriteria: All four enrollment steps are described in English
Contact section displays English text
Process descriptions are clear and professional in English

requirements.text: Convert the Gallery page category labels and image titles from bilingual Hindi/English to English only
acceptanceCriteria: All category tabs show English labels
Image titles and descriptions are in English only

requirements.text: Translate the Contact page section headings, office hours, and form instructions from Hindi to English
acceptanceCriteria: Contact information labels are in English
Office hours display in English
Form submission messages appear in English

requirements.text: Convert the Registration form field labels, placeholders, section headings, and validation messages from Hindi to English
acceptanceCriteria: All form field labels are in English
Placeholders provide English guidance
Success and error toasts show English messages
Form sections have English headings

requirements.text: Update the ContactForm component submission success message and field labels from Hindi to English
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form labels are in English
Success toast notification displays in English
Submit button shows English text

requirements.text: Translate the Footer quick links, contact information labels, and social media section from Hindi to English
acceptanceCriteria: Footer navigation links are in English
Contact section labels are in English
Copyright and attribution text is in English

constraints: Preserve all existing functionality and component structure
Maintain the school's address and contact details exactly as they are
Do not modify the immutable paths: useInternetIdentity hooks, useActor.ts, main.tsx, and components/ui directory
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or layout
Changing the school's contact information or address
Implementing multi-language support or language switcher
